_comment: Generated by build/scripts/generate_media_inventory.py - regenerate rather than hand-editing current_* fields. owner_facts / proposed_* / approval_status fields ARE meant to be edited (by agreement with the owner) and survive regeneration.

#41 Solid red oak strip flooring in a grand Solana Beach estate on the edge of Rancho Santa Fe, carefully restored to its natural color. The first photo shows the floor sanded down to raw wood mid-process, with dust-control plastic protecting sensitive areas and fillers applied between boards. The second photo reveals the finished floor still wet with a mirror-like sheen, hallway lights reflecting across the surface. This long North County San Diego hallway demonstrates traditional hardwood floor refinishing done to perfection, restoring the warmth and beauty of natural red oak.
placements.current_alt: Solana Beach hardwood floor refinishing project, solid red oak strip flooring sanded to raw wood during mid-process in a Rancho Santa Fe estate; dust-control plastic sheeting hung for containment and crack fillers applied between boards, North County San Diego traditional hardwood floor contractor restoring floors to natural color.

placements.project_or_section: 42 Solid teak parquet flooring in San Diego, a rare mid-century installation with a gorgeous pattern that had aged for decades. The first photo shows the parquet in worn, dull condition before sanding. The second photo captures the transformation after sanding and sealing—rotary equipment and full dust containment brought the teak back to life, revealing deep, rich tones enhanced with an oil sealer and finished to a satin sheen. The intricate parquet design now glows with warmth and precision craftsmanship.
placements.current_alt: San Diego hardwood floor refinishing project, rare solid teak parquet mid-century floor before sanding, surface worn and dull after decades of use; licensed flooring contractor restoring vintage parquet with professional dust-containment sanding systems.

placements.project_or_section: #43 Wide plank French oak flooring installation in a stunning La Jolla home above La Jolla Shores on Scenic Drive. This glued-down, unfinished square-edge rustic grade oak was carefully installed in random lengths and sanded to perfection. The first photo shows the raw, freshly installed planks before finishing. The second photo displays the natural beauty of the French oak after sanding, protected with a commercial-grade finish that will last for decades. At 5/8” thick with a 7” width and 4mm top layer, this seamless floor—with no beveled edges or wire brushing—highlights the straight lines, perfect board selection, and coastal craftsmanship of a high-end La Jolla estate overlooking the Pacific.
placements.current_alt: La Jolla hardwood floor installation project above La Jolla Shores, wide plank French oak flooring glued down in random lengths, unfinished rustic grade square edge planks sanded perfectly smooth before finishing, seamless luxury installation by San Diego flooring contractor.
placements.current_caption: La Jolla Scenic Drive French oak floors installed and finished natural with seamless precision.

placements.project_or_section: #44 Non-carbonized, horizontally laminated bamboo floor refinishing in a Solana Beach home perched above the ocean off Lomas Santa Fe. The first photo shows the bamboo sanded down to raw material after carefully removing the factory aluminum oxide coating. The second photo captures the transformation—this rare bamboo floor sanded to perfection and finished with Bona Traffic HD commercial-grade satin sheen, reflecting natural light from the ocean-view windows and recessed can lighting. This project showcases how North County San Diego bamboo floors—horizontal, vertical, carbonized or non-carbonized—can be restored flawlessly with dust containment systems that keep homes clean and safe during sanding.

placements.project_or_section: #47 Engineered maple hardwood floor refinishing in a 1960s home located between Del Mar and Solana Beach, on the south side of Rancho Santa Fe. These maple floors had yellowed, scratched, and sun-faded over decades, with a medallion centerpiece in the entryway, and the owners were ready to replace them. Instead, we restored them to perfection—repairing water damage from leaky windows, sanding the surface smooth, and finishing with a natural color and matte sheen that brought back the true beauty of the maple. The transformation surprised the homeowners, who decided to keep their original floors. This North County San Diego project highlights our specialty in repairing, refinishing, and custom finishing engineered maple floors while keeping homes clean and dust-free.
placements.current_alt: Engineered maple hardwood floor refinishing Del Mar Solana Beach Rancho Santa Fe area, 1960s home with scratched and sun-faded maple repaired and sanded smooth, water damage from windows fixed, floors finished with natural color matte sheen, North County San Diego contractor restoring coastal homes.
placements.current_caption: Del Mar–Solana Beach engineered maple floors repaired, sanded, and finished natural to perfection.

placements.project_or_section: #48 Walnut parquet hardwood floor refinishing in Encinitas, North County San Diego. This custom parquet design had dulled over time and required deep cleaning, sanding, and careful recoating. Using a dust-free containment system and Bona Traffic HD commercial-grade satin sheen finish, we restored the walnut to its original richness while keeping the home clean throughout the process. The result is a flawless parquet surface that highlights the natural beauty of walnut, showing how even intricate patterned floors can be renewed and protected for decades of use in coastal San Diego homes.

placements.project_or_section: #49 Solid wide plank rift and quartered white oak floor installation in Pacific Beach, San Diego. This select-grade, 4-inch random length flooring was nailed down in the traditional method and site finished for a seamless natural look. Using full dust-containment sanding equipment, the planks were sanded and coated cleanly in-home without airborne debris. Rift and quartered oak provides unmatched stability and a refined grain pattern, making this floor both durable and elegant for coastal San Diego living. Installed and finished by a licensed flooring contractor specializing in traditional solid hardwood floors.

placements.project_or_section: #50 Solid 3-inch wide rift and quartered white oak hardwood flooring installation in San Diego. This project began with plywood installation, followed by nail-down installation of unfinished select-grade oak. Once installed, the narrow planks were site finished to perfection with a Bona stain and protected with Bona commercial-grade polyurethane for lasting durability. The rift and quartered cut creates straight, elegant grain lines and excellent stability, giving this home a timeless look. Completed with dust-containment sanding equipment, this project showcases traditional craftsmanship and flawless finishing by a licensed San Diego hardwood floor contractor.

placements.current_visible_title: Engineered Maple Refinish Encinitas | Oceanfront Dustless Sanding
placements.current_description:
Fast answers: 858-699-0072 • sandiegohardwoods@gmail.com
 • www.sdhardwoods.com

See before/after in our photo galleries: www.sdhardwoods.com

Licensed Flooring Contractor • Bona Certified Craftsman: https://www.bona.com/en-us/homeowner/find-a-contractor/contractor-details/?storeid=83667

North County San Diego—Encinitas oceanfront home with a very thin-wear-layer engineered maple floor damaged by decades of sun, salt air, and moisture. A dedicated, highly experienced hardwood flooring professional performs the initial sanding with a Lägler HUMMEL. A Bona portable dust containment unit is used correctly here to capture 100% of the toxic aluminum-oxide dust at the source, keeping it from going airborne. Later stages (not shown) use the Bona Power Drive 4-head planetary to minimize wood removal and machine the surface glass-flat before color and a commercial-grade water-based topcoat (Traffic HD available in five sheen levels).

Coastal expertise: we refinish maple for modern looks—lighten and expose natural pink/yellow, neutralize with whites or creams, or return to a warm golden tone to match patina elsewhere. Get options and a finish plan tailored to UV, salt air, and maintenance needs.

What’s covered:
• Thin wear-layer assessment and careful aluminum-oxide removal
• Precision belt sanding on engineered maple (Lägler HUMMEL)
• Bona Power Drive planetary refinement later in the process (not shown)
• Coastal finish guidance: whites, creams, naturals, warm tones

Areas served: Encinitas, Solana Beach, Del Mar, Carlsbad, La Jolla, Oceanside, Rancho Santa Fe, San Clemente, Dana Point, Laguna Beach, Newport Beach, Newport Coast, and more..
